description: Work items, repositories, and pipelines via the Azure DevOps REST API. Authenticate with a Personal Access Token (PAT).

config_fields.description: Your Azure DevOps organization name (from the URL: dev.azure.com/{organization}).

endpoints.name: query_work_items
endpoints.description: Run a WIQL query to find work items in a project. Returns matching work item IDs and URLs.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: WIQL query string, e.g. "SELECT [System.Id],[System.Title] FROM WorkItems WHERE [System.State] = 'Active'".

endpoints.name: get_work_item
endpoints.description: Retrieve the details of a specific work item by its numeric ID.

endpoints.name: create_work_item
endpoints.description: Create a new work item (e.g. Task, Bug, User Story) in a project.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Work item type, e.g. Task, Bug, User Story, Epic.

parameters.name: title
parameters.description: Title of the new work item.

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: Description / acceptance criteria for the work item.

endpoints.name: list_repositories
endpoints.description: List all Git repositories in an Azure DevOps project.

endpoints.name: list_pipelines
endpoints.description: List all build/release pipelines in an Azure DevOps project.

endpoints.name: get_work_item_with_relations
endpoints.description: Retrieve a work item by ID including all parent/child relations. Call this before move_work_item to find the current parent relation index in the returned 'relations' array.

endpoints.name: list_iterations
endpoints.description: List all iteration paths (sprints) in a project as a tree. Use to discover valid System.IterationPath values before calling update_work_item.

endpoints.name: list_areas
endpoints.description: List all area paths in a project as a tree. Use to discover valid System.AreaPath values before calling update_work_item.

endpoints.name: list_work_item_types
endpoints.description: List all work item types available in a project (e.g. Task, Bug, User Story, Epic, Feature).

endpoints.name: list_states
endpoints.description: List valid states for a given work item type (e.g. Active, Closed, Resolved for a Bug). Use before update_work_item to ensure the state name is valid for that type.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Work item type name, e.g. 'Bug', 'Task', 'User Story'. Use list_work_item_types to find valid names.

endpoints.name: update_work_item
endpoints.description: Update fields on an existing work item. Only provided fields are changed. Supported: title, description, acceptance_criteria, state, iteration_path, area_path, priority (1-4), assigned_to (email), tags (semicolon-separated).

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The numeric work item ID to update.

parameters.name: acceptance_criteria
parameters.description: Acceptance criteria (HTML supported). Maps to Microsoft.VSTS.Common.AcceptanceCriteria.

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: New state, e.g. 'Active'. Use list_states to find valid values for the work item type.

parameters.name: iteration_path
parameters.description: Iteration path, e.g. 'MyProject\Sprint 3'. Use list_iterations to find valid paths.

parameters.name: area_path
parameters.description: Area path, e.g. 'MyProject\Backend'. Use list_areas to find valid paths.

parameters.name: assigned_to
parameters.description: Email address of the user to assign the work item to.

endpoints.name: move_work_item
endpoints.description: Re-parent a work item under a different epic, feature, or story. Call get_work_item_with_relations first to find the current parent relation index. If the item has no current parent, omit current_parent_relation_index.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The numeric ID of the work item to move.

parameters.name: new_parent_id
parameters.description: Numeric ID of the new parent work item.

parameters.name: current_parent_relation_index
parameters.description: Zero-based index of the existing parent relation in the 'relations' array from get_work_item_with_relations. Omit if the item currently has no parent.

endpoints.name: add_work_item_comment
endpoints.description: Add a comment to a work item's discussion thread. Text may be plain text or HTML.

parameters.name: text
parameters.description: The comment text (plain text or HTML).
